issues.detail: The skill lacks error handling and edge case coverage, focusing only on happy paths.
The code examples only cover web and React, not all listed platforms like React Native, Flutter, iOS, Android.

scenarios.name: React hover-driven Rive button
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses useRive + useStateMachineInput from @rive-app/react-canvas to drive a named boolean input on mouse events; baseline instantiates a generic canvas animation library without reading state machine inputs.

scenarios.name: Subscribe to Rive state changes and custom events
scenarios.rationale: Treatment subscribes via rive.on(EventType.StateChange) and rive.on(EventType.RiveEvent) per the skill; baseline polls or uses generic event listeners that do not match Rive's event API.
